meaning: n.推翻,打倒,扔得过远得球vt.打倒,推翻,颠覆
examples: I knew you would overthrow me in the end.
Then Washington hailed his overthrow while the past was erased.
Why, work night and day, body and soul, for the overthrow of the human race!
By 2011, President Obama was arming Libyan rebels and ordering airstrikes to overthrow Gadhafi.
In the summer of 1997, several members of the leadership team attempted to overthrow Gingrich.
